description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use three jobs: lint on ubuntu-20.04 that checks out the repository and runs psf/black@stable; build on ubuntu-20.04 that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.7, installs dependencies, builds the package, and publishes to PyPI if a tag is pushed; and test on a matrix of ubuntu-20.04 and windows-2019 that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.7, installs the package, and runs tests with ue4-docker.
